title: Baseline: BTF (quarantined SOTA, FPFH memory bank)
description: The systole nnU-Net move: BTF (Back to the Feature) = handcrafted FPFH + RGB in a PatchCore-style memory bank (~0.96 AU-PRO, no training). Run it quarantined via the 3D-ADS repo (github.com/eliahuhorwitz/3D-ADS), score through OUR eval harness. The honest SOTA-floor our deployable model is reported against. baselines/btf/.

title: Recon #6: diffusion reconstruction (generative flex)
description: ORDER 5 (ambitious/optional). Diffusion trained on normal; test = noise->denoise heals anomalies toward normal, diff = anomaly. Plays the generative strength (AudioLDM/Stable-Audio transfer). Differentiator, later.

title: Recon #5: DRAEM-synthesis (reconstruct + discriminate, ties to Stage-1 engine)
description: ORDER 4. Synthesize fake defects on normal samples -> train restore-normal + segment-defect. SOTA-competitive (DAS3D/3DSR are 3D DRAEM). THE convergence point with the Stage-1 synthetic engine (synthscape-17p).

title: Recon #4: feature-reconstruction / reverse-distillation (RD4AD-style)
description: ORDER 3. Frozen encoder + trained decoder rebuilds the encoder FEATURES from a bottleneck; anomaly = feature-space error. Strong 2D-AD family, avoids blurry-pixel problem. Shares harness + eval.

title: Recon #3: masked-inpainting model (RIAD/MAE-style)
description: ORDER 2. Mask random grid patches, train to inpaint from context; test = badly-inpainted regions are anomalous. Kills the identity shortcut, grid-native. The cheap real bump after the VAE. Shares harness + eval.
notes: Built + evaluated (bagel): AU-PRO 0.014, unchanged from VAE. Inpainting did NOT fix localization — raw-xyz residual tracks geometric complexity (rim/grazing) not defect-ness; smooth defects get low residual regardless of masking. Reconstruction-in-raw-space is weak here (measured across 3 variants). Real levers: rgb/fused modality, or feature-space/memory-bank residual.

title: Recon #1: vanilla conv-AE (the strawman floor)
description: ORDER 1b (optional). Plain conv AE on the xyz grid, anomaly = per-pixel recon error. The identity-shortcut strawman; honest floor. Shares the harness from synthscape-y83. May fold into the VAE task as an ablation.

title: Grazing-angle normal noise: tighten preprocess if the VAE cares
description: From the --normals viz (2026-06-26): where the surface tilts away from the scanner, structured-light sampling is sparse/noisy with depth-quantization banding -> garbage normals (PCA can't fit a stable plane). Centroid-clip+SOR+erosion don't catch it. Option: drop low-normal-confidence / non-scanner-facing points. DEFER until the VAE shows whether it matters (noise is consistent across train+test). See learning/2026-06-25_fpfh-and-neighborhoods.md.

title: Axis 1: segmentation (keep reachable for the platform role)
description: Dense spatial labeling on the breadth axis; shares the eval harness. The lever that completes the CV-platform target. Optional, after the spine.

title: Stage 2: edge deploy (ONNX -> TensorRT + benchmark)
description: ONNX export with parity check (train-vs-deploy skew discipline, carried), TensorRT, FPS/latency/memory. Target <1% AUROC/AU-PRO loss vs full precision.

title: Stage 1: synthetic defect engine + sim-to-real triad
description: Render synthetic defects (Isaac/Omniverse to plant the engine axis, or Blender). Train synth->test real; report the triad (real ceiling / synth-only / synth+DA). Then closed-loop curriculum. Isaac-vs-Blender fork decided here.

title: pointcloud-viewer (web, cardioview analog)
description: three.js/Open3D-web: predicted anomaly heatmap on the 3D cloud, drop-your-own-scan, in-browser ONNX. Built only once there is a model output to show.

title: Stage 0: anomaly scoring (residual + latent Mahalanobis)
description: Per-pixel reconstruction residual -> pixel anomaly map (AU-PRO); top-residual aggregate -> image score (AUROC); latent Mahalanobis as a second score.
notes: Residual map + top-k image score done (evaluation/scoring.py). Pending: latent Mahalanobis as the second score.

title: Stage 0: eval harness (the contribution)
description: image AUROC, pixel AU-PRO, calibration (ECE) under shift, per-condition diagnostics (defect type/category). The differentiator; carried from acoustic eval. nnU-Net-style: PatchCore/M3DM quarantined baseline through the SAME eval.
notes: Image AUROC + pixel AU-PRO (per-region envelope, metric self-verified perfect=1/random=0.17) + per-category + results.json + MLflow done. Pending: calibration (ECE), more per-condition diagnostics (defect-type).

title: Stage 0: reconstruction VAE on the position-map grid
description: Build the VAE (ported from acoustic anomaly work): encoder/decoder on the organized xyz grid; masked reconstruction loss (valid pixels only); train on good only. Geometry-only (3ch) first; rgb/fused later.
notes:
MODEL #2 in the reconstruction ladder + the shared GPU-resident harness. Build: mirage/data/dataset.py (whole split -> one VRAM tensor, on-device batching), mirage/models/vae.py (conv VAE on the 256 xyz grid), mirage/training/{hparams,losses,train}.py. Efficiency: dataset fits in 32GB VRAM -> GPU-resident whole-epoch (acoustic trick), bf16 autocast, channels_last, TF32, torch.compile, big batch. Train on good only. Hardware: RTX 5090 32GB, 32 cores, 100GB RAM.
Harness + VAE built and smoke-tested (bagel: loss 1.38->0.67, 0.07s/epoch, RTX 5090). Remaining for this task: train full dataset + wire anomaly scoring/eval (separate beads 6v3/2zm).

title: Data loader/store: unified raw->processed (MVTec 3D-AD)
description: mirage/data: adapter (mvtec.py) + preprocess contract (background mask, flying-pixel removal, bbox crop, resize, physical-scale normalize) + store.py (processed/mvtec3d/<paramkey>/ data/*.npz + unified meta.csv). DONE this commit; verify full-dataset build.
